bilateral_patient_level_design.inference: Patient-cluster bootstrap for test category confidence intervals.

AL.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

Mean_K.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

ACD.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

LT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

covariance.method: Eye-level reweighted Minimum Covariance Determinant after patient-level split; support_fraction 0.75; eigenvalue floor 1e-8 of maximum eigenvalue

calibration.method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-local empirical calibration; Gaussian age kernel bandwidth 8 years selected in a separate tuning set; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

al_conditional_geometry.method: Conditional robust Gaussian geometry using the covariance Schur complement; AL is conditioned on after continuous age standardization and is excluded from the conditional distance
al_conditional_geometry.calibration_method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-and-AL-local empirical calibration; joint Gaussian kernel bandwidths 8 years and 1 standardized AL; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

AL.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

Mean_K.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

ACD.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

LT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

WTW.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

CCT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

covariance.method: Eye-level reweighted Minimum Covariance Determinant after patient-level split; support_fraction 0.75; eigenvalue floor 1e-8 of maximum eigenvalue

calibration.method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-local empirical calibration; Gaussian age kernel bandwidth 4 years selected in a separate tuning set; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

al_conditional_geometry.method: Conditional robust Gaussian geometry using the covariance Schur complement; AL is conditioned on after continuous age standardization and is excluded from the conditional distance
al_conditional_geometry.calibration_method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-and-AL-local empirical calibration; joint Gaussian kernel bandwidths 8 years and 1 standardized AL; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

limitations: Inter-eye dependence is handled by patient-level splits and cluster-bootstrap validation; covariance geometry remains eye-level.
Clinical indication, phakic status, prior refractive surgery, and device quality warnings are not verified by EMR.
Age adjustment removes cross-sectional institutional age trends and must not be interpreted as longitudinal biological change.
External-center and other-biometer validation remain required.
OOD percentile measures anatomical rarity, not postoperative prediction error or measurement failure.
The AL-conditioned score uses a linear conditional covariance approximation after robust age standardization; nonlinear AL relationships and sparse AL extremes require external validation.
